The kb-writer and reflection plugins ship these hooks to consuming projects via the catalog, but sessions in THIS repo don't have the plugins installed — so the loop the docs describe never actually fires here. Rename this file to settings.json (or merge into settings.local.json) to close the loop: KB index surfaced at session start, reflection nudge on a red gate, lesson-capture prompt on stop. Hook cwd is the project root, so paths are repo-relative.

hooks.prompt: Before stopping: did this session produce a durable lesson, pattern, gotcha, or decision worth keeping? If so, capture it in the project knowledge base (use the curating-knowledge skill or `bun run kb:add`). If nothing durable emerged, just stop.
